apis.name: ProduceRequest
apis.notes: Phase 07 Produce exactness slice; routed API remains pre-advertisement because the repo still lacks a stable Java/librdkafka differential harness. Broker version-matrix and storage exactness tests are present, but current advertised versions stay null until external client proof lands.
